title: Sarcoglottis grandiflora
taxonomy: Sarcoglottis grandiflora is a species of orchid in the subfamily Orchidoideae. It belongs to the genus Sarcoglottis, which is part of the family Orchidaceae. The family Orchidaceae is a large and diverse group of flowering plants that includes over 30,000 species. Sarcoglottis grandiflora is native to Central and South America, where it can be found in a variety of habitats. The classification of Sarcoglottis grandiflora is further divided into several taxonomic ranks, including species, genus, and family.
uses: Sarcoglottis grandiflora has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Brazil, due to its potential health benefits.
